title: Vitascope Pictures.
content:
A young girl stands
        Upon the sands,
     And waves her hands--
        Flirtation.

     A fresh young man
        With shoes of tan,
     Looks spick and span--
        Expectation.

     They walk the beach,
        She seems a peach
     Just out of reach--
        Vexation.

     Ah what is this?
        A sound of bliss
     A kiss, a kiss--
        Elation.

     A father lean
        Upon the scene,
     Looks awful mean--
        (Curtain.)
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edwin C. Ranck, titled "Vitascope Pictures.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
